question_intent: Total points scored by players who have won at least one All-Star award and have played for teams in the Campbell Conference

plan.question_intent: Total points scored by players who have won at least one All-Star award and have played for teams in the Campbell Conference
plan.detail_query: SELECT playerid, SUM(pts) AS total_points FROM {{leaf_1}} AS leaf_1 GROUP BY playerid

blocks.name: leaf_1
join_clauses: JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code AND ab.type = 'Conference'
where_clauses: a.award = 'First Team All-Star' OR a.award = 'Second Team All-Star'
blocks.notes: Points scored by All-Star players in the Campbell Conference

blocks.name: root
blocks.from_clause: FROM (SELECT playerid, SUM(pts) AS total_points FROM {{leaf_1}} AS leaf_1 GROUP BY playerid) AS subquery
blocks.notes: Total points scored by All-Star players in the Campbell Conference

build_logs.notes: Points scored by All-Star players in the Campbell Conference

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code AND ab.type = 'Conference'
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code AND ab.type = 'Conference'
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: a.award = 'First Team All-Star' OR a.award = 'Second Team All-Star'
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code AND ab.type = 'Conference'
WHERE (a.award = 'First Team All-Star' OR a.award = 'Second Team All-Star')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code AND ab.type = 'Conference'
WHERE (a.award = 'First Team All-Star' OR a.award = 'Second Team All-Star') AND (ab.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')
LIMIT 5

SELECT s.playerid, s.pts
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code AND ab.type = 'Conference'
WHERE (a.award = 'First Team All-Star' OR a.award = 'Second Team All-Star') AND (ab.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')

build_logs.notes: Total points scored by All-Star players in the Campbell Conference

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT playerid, SUM(pts) AS total_points FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.pts
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code AND ab.type = 'Conference'
WHERE (a.award = 'First Team All-Star' OR a.award = 'Second Team All-Star') AND (ab.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')) AS leaf_1 GROUP BY playerid) AS subquery
LIMIT 5

SELECT SUM(total_points) AS total_points
FROM (SELECT playerid, SUM(pts) AS total_points FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.pts
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev AS ab ON t.confid = ab.code AND ab.type = 'Conference'
WHERE (a.award = 'First Team All-Star' OR a.award = 'Second Team All-Star') AND (ab.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')) AS leaf_1 GROUP BY playerid) AS subquery

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(pts) AS total_points
FROM (SELECT s.playerid, s.year, s.tmid, s.pts, a.award
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN awardsplayers AS a ON s.playerid = a.playerid
JOIN seriespost AS sp ON s.tmid = sp.tmidwinner
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
WHERE (a.award LIKE '%All-Star%')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total number of points scored by all players who were named First Team All-Stars or Second Team All-Stars in the Campbell Conference?
